business.name: MorCan Financial Inc.
business.address: Suite 346, 14-3650 Langstaff Road, Woodbridge, ON L4L 9A8

team.name: Joe Taibi
team.background: Former Professor at Seneca College, former Loans Manager at TD Bank Group

valueProposition: Working for you, not the Banks. Access to 50+ lending institutions.

testimonials.name: Sandra Burke
testimonials.quote: Morcan Financial has been my home as a mortgage professional for almost 20 years. Joe and staff have helped me grow my knowledge of the industry: all while making me feel like part of a family.

testimonials.name: Rob Couse
testimonials.quote: Joe and his staff have been very helpful to me and my family for any of my mortgage needs and questions. I do not hesitate giving Morcan the two thumbs up.

testimonials.name: Jordell James
testimonials.quote: The owner, Joe Taibi is the #1 reason I recommend MorCan to anyone I come across who is looking for a brokerage that they can learn and grow with.

testimonials.name: John Benstead
testimonials.title: Top agent in Canada, Morcan Agent since 2005
testimonials.quote: The family atmosphere together with the integrity that matches my own, allows me to unequivocally endorse Morcan, as the only brokerage for me.

testimonials.name: Christina Burke
testimonials.title: Top agent in Canada, With Morcan since 1997
testimonials.quote: I have been with Morcan Financial since 1997. None match the value proposition and the family atmosphere of Morcan Financial.

testimonials.name: Kerryon Nugent
testimonials.title: Top agent in Canada, Morcan Team Leader since 2003
testimonials.quote: Ever since I started with Morcan I knew this was the company I wanted to be with. The support I receive, the family atmosphere and the ease and flexibility of getting paid is 2nd to none.

lenderNetwork: 50+ lending institutions including major banks, credit unions, trusts, national and regional lenders

issues: Images use lazyload-placeholder.png instead of real images
